description:
Prepare the 'client_house_with_solar.skp' model for a client proposal by creating three specific Scenes. 

1) Create a scene named exactly 'Site Plan': Use Parallel Projection, set to standard Top View, with Shadows OFF.
2) Create a scene named exactly '3D Overview': Use Parallel Projection, set to standard Iso View, with Shadows ON.
3) Create a scene named exactly 'Street View': Use Perspective Camera, position the camera near ground level (approx 4-8 feet high) looking at the front of the house, with Shadows ON.

Save the completed file as 'proposal_ready.skp' in the Documents folder (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\) when finished.
